footer.description: Search with confidence, live safely. A premier Egyptian rental platform connecting tenants and landlords with ease and transparency.

howItWorksPage.title: How Sakani Works?
howItWorksPage.subtitle: Discover the steps to easily rent or list properties safely in Egypt
howItWorksPage.forTenantsSubtitle: Find your perfect university or shared housing in 3 simple steps
howItWorksPage.tenantStep1Desc: Browse apartments, rooms, or vacant beds. Use filters for city, price, target category, or study major to find the perfect roommates.
howItWorksPage.tenantStep2Desc: Select your preferred date and time for viewing, and leave a note for the landlord. Your request is immediately sent to the owner.
howItWorksPage.tenantStep3Desc: Once the owner accepts your request, you can see their phone number and contact details to finalize the agreement and secure your booking.
howItWorksPage.forLandlordsSubtitle: Rent out your units, rooms, or beds to students and youth efficiently
howItWorksPage.landlordStep1Desc: Specify details, rental price, and listing type (apartment, room, bed). Set the target gender (male or female), and upload high-quality photos.
howItWorksPage.landlordStep2Desc: Track viewing requests from students, see their majors and proposed times. Accept to share contact info and start talking directly.
howItWorksPage.landlordStep3Desc: Register lease contracts or vacate beds online to automatically update unit vacancy status on the platform with no effort.
howItWorksPage.ctaSubtitle: Whether you are looking for a place or want to lease your property, Sakani is your ideal destination.
